modules.name: dimp.msg.base
documentation:
Message Transforming
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    Instant Message <-> Secure Message <-> Reliable Message
    +-------------+     +------------+     +--------------+
    |  sender     |     |  sender    |     |  sender      |
    |  receiver   |     |  receiver  |     |  receiver    |
    |  time       |     |  time      |     |  time        |
    |             |     |            |     |              |
    |  content    |     |  data      |     |  data        |
    +-------------+     |  key/keys  |     |  key/keys    |
                        +------------+     |  signature   |
                                           +--------------+
    Algorithm:
        data      = password.encrypt(content)
        key       = receiver.public_key.encrypt(password)
        signature = sender.private_key.sign(data)
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-
DIMP : Decentralized Instant Messaging Protocol
Written in 2019 by Moky <albert.moky@gmail.com>
MIT License
Copyright (c) 2019 Albert Moky

classes.name: dimp.protocol.quote.QuoteContent

methods.name: dimp.protocol.quote.QuoteContent.create
documentation:
Create quote content with text & original message info

```
param text

message text

param envelope

original message head

param content

original message body

return

ReceiptCommand
```
Factory method

Quote Message content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x37,
    sn   : 456,

    text    : "...",  // text message
    origin  : {       // original message envelope
        sender   : "...",
        receiver : "...",

        type     : 0x01,
        sn       : 123,
    }
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.quote.CombineContent

methods.name: dimp.protocol.quote.CombineContent.create
documentation: Factory methods

Combine Forward message
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0xFF,
    sn   : 456,

    title    : "...",  // chat title
    messages : [...]   // chat history
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.receipt.ReceiptCommand

methods.name: dimp.protocol.receipt.ReceiptCommand.create
documentation:
Create base receipt command with text & original message info

```
param text

message text

param envelope

original message head

param content

original message body

return

ReceiptCommand
```
Factory method

Receipt Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x88,
    sn   : 456,

    command : "receipt",
    text    : "...",  // text message
    origin  : {       // original message envelope
        sender    : "...",
        receiver  : "...",
        time      : 0,

        sn        : 123,
        signature : "..."
    }
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.money.TransferContent

methods.name: dimp.protocol.money.TransferContent.transfer
documentation: Factory method

Transfer Money Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x41,
    sn   : 123,

    currency : "RMB",    // USD, USDT, ...
    amount   : 100.00,
    remitter : "{FROM}", // sender ID
    remittee : "{TO}"    // receiver ID
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.groups.HistoryCommand
documentation:
History Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x89,
    sn   : 123,

    command : "...", // command name
    time    : 0,     // command timestamp
    extra   : info   // command parameters
}
noinspection PyAbstractClass

group (group ID already fetched in Content)
member/members

methods.name: dimp.protocol.groups.GroupCommand.expel
documentation: Deprecated (use 'reset' instead)

methods.name: dimp.protocol.groups.GroupCommand.hire
documentation: Administrators, Assistants

class_variables.name: dimp.protocol.groups.GroupCommand.EXPEL
documentation: Deprecated (use 'reset' instead)

class_variables.name: dimp.protocol.groups.GroupCommand.QUERY
documentation: (not history command)

Group Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x89,
    sn   : 123,

    command : "invite",         // "expel", "quit"
    time    : 0,                // timestamp
    group   : "{GROUP_ID}",     // group ID
    member  : "{MEMBER_ID}",    // member ID
    members : ["{MEMBER_ID}",]  // member ID list
}

```
return

MetaCommand
```

Meta Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x88,
    sn   : 123,

    command : "meta", // command name
    ID      : "{ID}", // contact's ID
    meta    : {...}   // When meta is empty, means query meta for ID
}
Core Commands       #

classes.name: dimp.protocol.commands.DocumentCommand

methods.name: dimp.protocol.commands.DocumentCommand.document
documentation: document

methods.name: dimp.protocol.commands.DocumentCommand.last_time
documentation: Last document time for querying

methods.name: dimp.protocol.commands.DocumentCommand.query
documentation:
1. Query Entity Document
2. Query Entity Document for updating with last time

```
param identifier

entity ID

param last_time

last document time

return

DocumentCommand
```
Factory methods

methods.name: dimp.protocol.commands.DocumentCommand.response
documentation:
1. Send Meta and Document to new friend
2. Response Entity Document

```
param identifier

entity ID

param meta

entity meta

param document

entity document

return

DocumentCommand
```

Document Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x88,
    sn   : 123,

    command   : "document", // command name
    ID        : "{ID}",     // entity ID
    meta      : {...},      // only for handshaking with new friend
    document  : {...},      // when document is empty, means query for ID
    last_time : 12345       // old document time for querying
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.files.FileContent

methods.name: dimp.protocol.files.FileContent.password
documentation: symmetric key to decrypt the encrypted data from URL

methods.name: dimp.protocol.files.FileContent.create
documentation: Factories

classes.name: dimp.protocol.files.ImageContent
documentation:
Image Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x12,
    sn   : 123,

    data     : "...",        // base64_encode(fileContent)
    filename : "photo.png",

    URL      : "http://...", // download from CDN
    // before fileContent uploaded to a public CDN,
    // it should be encrypted by a symmetric key
    key      : {             // symmetric key to decrypt file content
        algorithm : "AES",   // "DES", ...
        data      : "{BASE64_ENCODE}",
        ...
    },
    thumbnail : "data:image/jpeg;base64,..."
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.files.AudioContent
documentation:
Audio Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x14,
    sn   : 123,

    data     : "...",        // base64_encode(fileContent)
    filename : "photo.png",

    URL      : "http://...", // download from CDN
    // before fileContent uploaded to a public CDN,
    // it should be encrypted by a symmetric key
    key      : {             // symmetric key to decrypt file content
        algorithm : "AES",   // "DES", ...
        data      : "{BASE64_ENCODE}",
        ...
    },
    text     : "..."         // Automatic Speech Recognition
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.files.VideoContent
documentation:
Video Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x16,
    sn   : 123,

    data     : "...",        // base64_encode(fileContent)
    filename : "photo.png",

    URL      : "http://...", // download from CDN
    // before fileContent uploaded to a public CDN,
    // it should be encrypted by a symmetric key
    key      : {             // symmetric key to decrypt file content
        algorithm : "AES",   // "DES", ...
        data      : "{BASE64_ENCODE}",
        ...
    },
    snapshot : "data:image/jpeg;base64,..."
}

documentation: Factory methods

Top-Secret Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0xFF,
    sn   : 456,

    forward : {...}  // reliable (secure + certified) message
    secrets : [...]  // reliable (secure + certified) messages
}

methods.name: dimp.protocol.contents.PageContent.html
documentation: Page content

methods.name: dimp.protocol.contents.PageContent.create
documentation: Factory methods

Web Page message
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x20,
    sn   : 123,

    title : "...",                // Web title
    desc  : "...",
    icon  : "data:image/x-icon;base64,...",

    URL   : "https://github.com/moky/dimp",

    HTML      : "...",            // Web content
    mime_type : "text/html",      // Content-Type
    encoding  : "utf8",
    base      : "about:blank"     // Base URL
}

classes.name: dimp.protocol.contents.NameCard

methods.name: dimp.protocol.contents.NameCard.create
documentation: Factory method

Name Card Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x33,
    sn   : 123,

    ID     : "{ID}",        // contact's ID
    name   : "{nickname}}", // contact's name
    avatar : "{URL}"        // avatar - PNF(URL)
}

documentation:
Quote Message content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x37,
    sn   : 456,

    text    : "...",  // text message
    origin  : {       // original message envelope
        sender   : "...",
        receiver : "...",

        type     : 0x01,
        sn       : 123,
    }
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.quote.CombineForwardContent
documentation:
Combine Forward message
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0xFF,
    sn   : 456,

    title    : "...",  // chat title
    messages : [...]   // chat history
}

modules.name: dimp.dkd.commands
documentation:
Meta Command Protocol
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

1. contains 'ID' only, means query meta for ID
2. contains 'meta' (must match), means reply

classes.name: dimp.dkd.commands.BaseMetaCommand

methods.name: dimp.dkd.commands.BaseMetaCommand.identifier
documentation: ID

methods.name: dimp.dkd.commands.BaseMetaCommand.meta
documentation: Meta

Meta Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x88,
    sn   : 123,

    command : "meta", // command name
    ID      : "{ID}", // contact's ID
    meta    : {...}   // When meta is empty, means query meta for ID
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.commands.BaseDocumentCommand

methods.name: dimp.dkd.commands.BaseDocumentCommand.document
documentation: document

Document Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x88,
    sn   : 123,

    command   : "document", // command name
    ID        : "{ID}",     // entity ID
    meta      : {...},      // only for handshaking with new friend
    document  : {...},      // when document is empty, means query for ID
    signature : "..."       // old document's signature for querying
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.receipt.BaseReceiptCommand

methods.name: dimp.dkd.receipt.BaseReceiptCommand.text
documentation: -------- setters/getters

Receipt Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x88,
    sn   : 456,

    command : "receipt",
    text    : "...",  // text message
    origin  : {       // original message envelope
        sender    : "...",
        receiver  : "...",
        time      : 0,

        sn        : 123,
        signature : "..."
    }
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.money.BaseMoneyContent
documentation:
Money Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x40,
    sn   : 123,

    currency : "RMB", // USD, USDT, ...
    amount   : 100.00
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.money.TransferMoneyContent
documentation:
Transfer Money Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x41,
    sn   : 123,

    currency : "RMB",    // USD, USDT, ...
    amount   : 100.00,
    remitter : "{FROM}", // sender ID
    remittee : "{TO}"    // receiver ID
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.contents.BaseTextContent

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.BaseTextContent.text
documentation: text

Text Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x01,
    sn   : 123,

    text : "..."
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.contents.ListContent
documentation:
Content Array message
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0xCA,
    sn   : 123,

    contents : [...]  // content list
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.contents.SecretContent

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.SecretContent.forward
documentation: forward (top-secret message)

Top-Secret Message Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0xFF,
    sn   : 456,

    forward : {...}  // reliable (secure + certified) message
    secrets : [...]  // reliable (secure + certified) messages
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.contents.WebPageContent

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.WebPageContent.title
documentation: Web Title

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.WebPageContent.icon
documentation: Fav Icon

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.WebPageContent.desc
documentation: Description

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.WebPageContent.url
documentation: Page URL

methods.name: dimp.dkd.contents.WebPageContent.html
documentation: Page content

Web Page message
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x20,
    sn   : 123,

    title : "...",                // Web title
    icon  : "...",                // base64_encode(icon)
    desc  : "...",

    URL   : "https://github.com/moky/dimp",

    HTML      : "...",            // Web content
    mime_type : "text/html",      // Content-Type
    encoding  : "utf8",
    base      : "about:blank"     // Base URL
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.contents.NameCardContent
documentation:
Name Card Content
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x33,
    sn   : 123,

    ID     : "{ID}",        // contact's ID
    name   : "{nickname}}", // contact's name
    avatar : "{URL}"        // avatar - PNF(URL)
}

modules.name: dimp.dkd.groups
documentation:
Group Command Protocol
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

1. invite member
2. expel member
3. member quit
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: dimp.dkd.groups.BaseHistoryCommand
documentation:
History Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x89,
    sn   : 123,

    command : "...", // command name
    time    : 0,     // command timestamp
    extra   : info   // command parameters
}

classes.name: dimp.dkd.groups.BaseGroupCommand

methods.name: dimp.dkd.groups.BaseGroupCommand.member
documentation: group (group ID already fetched in Content)
member/members

Group Command
~~~~~~~~~~~~~

data format: {
    type : 0x89,
    sn   : 123,

    command : "invite",         // "expel", "quit"
    time    : 0,                // timestamp
    group   : "{GROUP_ID}",     // group ID
    member  : "{MEMBER_ID}",    // member ID
    members : ["{MEMBER_ID}",], // member ID list
}

methods.name: dimp.dkd.groups.InviteGroupCommand.__init__
documentation:
Create invite group member command

```
param content

command content

param group

group ID

param member

member ID

param members

member list

return

InviteCommand object
```
